title: aster albescens var. rugosus
intro: Aster albescens var. rugosus, also known as the rough-leaved white aster, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant is known to provide several health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and boosting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Aster albescens var. rugosus typically involve infusion, decoction, or tincture, often used to treat various ailments, including colds, fever, and skin conditions.
